title: lithocardium grandiflorum
intro: Lithocardium grandiflorum, also known as the lithospermum grandiflorum, is a flowering plant native to China, characterized by its unique blue flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat cardiovascular diseases due to its vasodilatory and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Lithocardium grandiflorum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart attacks, strokes, and other cardiovascular-related complications. The herbal preparations of lithocardium grandiflorum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
intro_study: According to "Experimental and clinical endocrinology & diabetes : official journal, German Society of Endocrinology [and] German Diabetes Association", lithocardium grandiflorum (presumably licorice) possesses therapeutic properties that include reducing body fat mass.
